exec-model-ruleunit/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
exec-model-ruleunit/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin (e.g., 3.8.1) do not support compiling code targeting Java 21, resulting in build failures or inability to set source/target to 21.
